secao1.paragrafo1: The privacy of My Clock users is a priority.
secao1.paragrafo2: This Privacy Policy describes how information is treated within the application and clarifies how personal data is stored and protected.
secao1.paragrafo3: My Clock was developed with a focus on privacy, user autonomy and compliance with the principles of GDPR (General Data Protection Regulation).

secao2.paragrafo1: The application allows the user to record information such as:
listaDados: overtime calculations and estimated gross pay
secao2.paragrafo2: This data is used exclusively for the internal functioning of the application itself.

secao3.paragrafo1: All data entered is stored exclusively on the user's own device, using local storage (IndexedDB/local storage).
listaGarantias: the developer does not receive your data
no information is sent to remote servers
there is no automatic cloud synchronization
secao3.paragrafo3: All control remains exclusively with the user.

secao4.paragrafo1: The developer does not have remote access to the information entered into the application.
secao4.paragrafo2: There is no active collection of personal data, individual monitoring or viewing of users' private records.
secao4.paragrafo3: The information remains private and accessible only by the user on the device used.

secao5.paragrafo1: As the data only remains on the local device, the user is responsible for performing periodic backups through the export functions provided by the application.
secao5.paragrafo2: In cases of changing devices, cleaning the browser, formatting or losing the device, data may be lost if there is no prior backup.

secao6.paragrafo1: Currently, My Clock does not use tracking cookies, Google Analytics or behavioral monitoring tools.
secao6.paragrafo2: If this is implemented in the future, this Privacy Policy will be updated.

secao7.paragrafo1: The application may contain links to external contact, such as support email.
secao7.paragrafo2: The developer is not responsible for the privacy practices of external services accessed outside the application.

secao8.paragrafo1: This Privacy Policy may be updated at any time to reflect improvements to the application, legal adjustments or operational changes.
secao8.paragrafo2: The latest version will always be available within the system itself.

secao9.paragrafo1: For questions, suggestions or issues related to this Privacy Policy, please contact us via email:
